perturbation.original_text: WHEREAS, Shipper has requested Transporter to transport Gas on its behalf and Transporter represents that it is willing to transport Gas under the terms and conditions of this Agreement. NOW, THEREFORE, Transporter and Shipper agree that the terms below constitute the transportation service to be provided and the rights and obligations of Shipper and Transporter.
perturbation.changed_text: WHEREAS, ANR PIPELINE COMPANY has requested Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership to transport Gas on its behalf and Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership represents that it is willing to transport Gas under the terms and conditions of this Agreement. NOW, THEREFORE, Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership and ANR PIPELINE COMPANY agree that the terms below constitute the transportation service to be provided and the rights and obligations of Service Provider and Gas Company.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'Transporter' with 'Service Provider' and 'Shipper' with 'Gas Company' creates confusion. While the 'WHEREAS' clause specifically names the parties, using different terms throughout the rest of the document creates ambiguity as to whether 'Service Provider' and 'Gas Company' always refer to Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership and ANR PIPELINE COMPANY, respectively. This is contradicting the 'WHEREAS' cause where is defining who the 'Shipper' and 'Transporter' are.
perturbation.contradicted_text: OTHER PROVISIONS: It is agreed that no personal liability whatsoever shall attach to, be imposed on or otherwise be incurred by any Partner, agent, management official or employee of the Transporter or any director, officer or employee of any of the foregoing, for any obligation of the Transporter arising under this Agreement or for any claim based on such obligation and that the sole recourse of Shipper under this Agreement is limited to assets of the Transporter. Upon termination of this Agreement, Shipper's and Transporter's obligations to each other arising under this Agreement, prior to the date of termination, remain in effect and are not being terminated by any provision of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces 'Service Provider' and 'Gas Company' while the contradicted text references 'Transporter' and 'Shipper'. The explanation clarifies that this creates ambiguity as to whether 'Service Provider' and 'Gas Company' always refer to Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership and ANR PIPELINE COMPANY, respectively. This directly contradicts the contradicted text because that text refers to parties with different terminology, which creates ambiguity and possible conflict over liability and obligations, aligning with the definition of misaligned terminology leading to in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 9. RATES: Unless Shipper and Transporter have agreed to a rate other than the maximum rate, rates shall be Transporter's maximum rates and charges plus all applicable surcharges in effect from time to time under the applicable Rate Schedule (as stated above) on file with the Commission unless otherwise agreed to by the parties in writing. Provisions governing a Rate other than the maximum shall be set forth in this Paragraph 9 and/or on Appendix B hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 9. RATES: Unless Customer and Provider have agreed to a rate other than the maximum rate, rates shall be Transporter's maximum rates and charges plus all applicable surcharges in effect from time to time under the applicable Rate Schedule (as stated above) on file with the Commission unless otherwise agreed to by the parties in writing. Provisions governing a Rate other than the maximum shall be set forth in this Paragraph 9 and/or on Appendix B hereto.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Shipper' to 'Customer' and 'Transporter' to 'Provider' in the RATES section creates uncertainty. The term 'Transporter' is still used in the phrase 'Transporter's maximum rates,' creating internal inconsistency. It's unclear if 'Provider' is the same as the 'Transporter' when referring to the rate calculation, creating a potential contradiction with the original definition of 'Transporter'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: INCORPORATION OF TARIFF INTO AGREEMENT: This Agreement shall incorporate and in all respects be subject to the "General Terms and Conditions" and the applicable Rate Schedule (as stated above) set forth in Transporter's FERC Gas Tariff, Third Revised Volume No. 1, as may be revised from time to time. Transporter may file and seek Commission approval under Section 4 of the Natural Gas Act (NGA) at any time and from time to time to change any rates, charges or provisions set forth in the applicable Rate Schedule (as stated above) and the "General Terms and Conditions" in Transporter's FERC Gas Tariff, Third Revised Volume No. 1, and Transporter shall have the right to place such changes in effect in accordance with the NGA, and this Agreement shall be deemed to include such changes and any such changes Source: TC PIPELINES LP, 10-K, 2/26/2016 which become effective by operation of law and Commission Order, without prejudice to Shipper's right to protest the same.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Shipper' and 'Transporter' to 'Customer' and 'Provider' in Paragraph 9, while retaining 'Transporter's maximum rates,' creates a direct conflict with the 'INCORPORATION OF TARIFF INTO AGREEMENT' section. This section explicitly refers to 'Transporter's FERC Gas Tariff' and the associated rate schedules. By using 'Provider' in Paragraph 9 for rate agreements but retaining 'Transporter's maximum rates', the agreement becomes ambiguous. It's unclear if the 'Provider' rates are tied to the 'Transporter's FERC Gas Tariff' as intended, creating a misaligned terminology contradiction. The altered text creates uncertainty regarding which entity's tariff applies, violating the definition of Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 15. NOTICES AND COMMUNICATIONS: All notices and communications with respect to this Agreement shall be in writing by mail, e-mail, or fax, or other means as agreed to by the parties, and sent to the addresses stated below or to any other such address(es) as may be designated in writing by mail, e-mail, or fax, or other means similarly agreed to: ADMINISTRATIVE MATTERS Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership Commercial Services 700 Louisiana St., Suite 700 Houston, TX 77002-2700 ANR PIPELINE COMPANY 700 Louisiana St., Suite 700 Houston, TX 77002-2700 Attn: AGREED TO BY: GREAT LAKES GAS TRANSMISSION LIMITED PARTNERSHIP By: Great Lakes Gas Transmission Company ANR PIPELINE COMPANY /s/ STEVEN D. JASKOLSKI Steven D. Jaskolski Director, Commercial Services /s/ JOSEPH E. POLLARD Joseph E. Pollard Director, Long Term Marketing Dated: December 14, 2015 Dated: December 14, 2015
perturbation.changed_text: 15. NOTICES AND COMMUNICATIONS: All notices and communications with respect to this Agreement shall be in writing by mail, e-mail, or fax, or other means as agreed to by the parties, and sent to the addresses stated below or to any other such address(es) as may be designated in writing by mail, e-mail, or fax, or other means similarly agreed to: ADMINISTRATIVE MATTERS Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership Commercial Services 700 Louisiana St., Suite 700 Houston, TX 77002-2700 ANR PIPELINE VENTURES 700 Louisiana St., Suite 700 Houston, TX 77002-2700 Attn: AGREED TO BY: GREAT LAKES GAS TRANSMISSION LIMITED PARTNERSHIP By: Great Lakes Gas Transmission Company ANR PIPELINE VENTURES /s/ STEVEN D. JASKOLSKI Steven D. Jaskolski Director, Commercial Services /s/ JOSEPH E. POLLARD Joseph E. Pollard Director, Long Term Marketing Dated: December 14, 2015 Dated: December 14, 2015
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'ANR PIPELINE COMPANY' to 'ANR PIPELINE VENTURES' in the 'NOTICES AND COMMUNICATIONS' section introduces uncertainty and contradicts the initial definition in the preamble. This raises the question of whether 'ANR PIPELINE VENTURES' is legally the same entity as 'ANR PIPELINE COMPANY' and whether notices sent to the former are valid. This change contradicts with the beginning of the Agreement where it mentions who the 'Shipper' is.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Transportation Service Agreement (Agreement) is entered into by Great Lakes Gas Transmission Limited Partnership (Transporter) and ANR PIPELINE COMPANY (Shipper). WHEREAS, Shipper has requested Transporter to transport Gas on its behalf and Transporter represents that it is willing to transport Gas under the terms and conditions of this Agreement. NOW, THEREFORE, Transporter and Shipper agree that the terms below constitute the transportation service to be provided and the rights and obligations of Shipper and Transporter.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'ANR PIPELINE COMPANY' to 'ANR PIPELINE VENTURES' directly contradicts the definition of 'Shipper' in the initial agreement, creating uncertainty about the contracting party and the validity of notices. This introduces a direct conflict, as the agreement explicitly identifies 'ANR PIPELINE COMPANY' as the 'Shipper' ('This Transportation Service Agreement (Agreement) is entered into by... ANR PIPELINE COMPANY (Shipper).'), and the changed text introduces a different entity, 'ANR PIPELINE VENTURES', potentially invalidating the agreement terms.
